title: Department Manager Vacancy at Landmark Group India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Landmark Group India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Group India in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Group India:
Landmark Group India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Group India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
